page.content: In the rapidly evolving landscape of professional services, understanding the financial performance and operational metrics of our consulting engagements is paramount. The accompanying table delineates key data concerning contract value by service line, highlighting crucial metrics such as Total Contracts and Revenue per Consultant for the years 2022 and 2023. Notably, the Amount (CAD) column reflects the total monetary value associated with our contracts, illustrating the financial growth trajectory within our various service lines.

lines.text: In the rapidly evolving landscape of professional services, understanding the financial performance and operational metrics of
our consulting engagements is paramount. The accompanying table delineates key data concerning contract value by service
line, highlighting crucial metrics such as Total Contracts and Revenue per Consultant for the years 2022 and 2023. Notably, the
Amount (CAD) column reflects the total monetary value associated with our contracts, illustrating the financial growth
trajectory within our various service lines.

page.content: Furthermore, the Percentage Change metric offers insights into the fluctuations in contract values year-over-year, which is pivotal for assessing market trends and client demand.

page.content: The Feedback Score provides an additional layer of analysis, allowing us to gauge client satisfaction and the effectiveness of our service delivery.

page.content: With a robust offshore delivery mix increasingly becoming a strategic focus, these metrics underscore our commitment to optimizing resource allocation and enhancing overall profitability. This data is essential for guiding future strategic decisions, ensuring that we remain competitive in a dynamic market.
